name: Banana Chip Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the first five dry ingredients into a large bowl and mix thoroughly.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry mixture.
3. Beat the egg until frothy.
4. Mix in the oil, milk, and mashed bananas. Pour this into the well.
5. Stir only to moisten. The batter will be lumpy.
6. Fill greased muffin tins about 3/4 full with the batter.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius) for 20 minutes.
